description: Milestone 2a: Auth domain scaffolding + credential storage + DI wiring. No real network integrations. Enforce Context7 usage for API/library correctness.

userStories.title: Auth domain model and state machine refinement
userStories.description: Introduce a clean authentication domain layer so real SSO can later replace fake auth without UI changes.
acceptanceCriteria: AuthState lives in the Domain layer
Explicit states: unauthenticated, authenticating, authenticated, failed
AuthRepository protocol exists
FakeAuthRepository implements AuthRepository
UI depends only on the protocol
Context7 consulted for SwiftUI state management best practices; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: CredentialStore abstraction backed by Keychain
userStories.description: Prepare secure credential storage for future token-based authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: CredentialStore protocol exists
KeychainCredentialStore implements it
Fake auth stores a dummy non-sensitive token
No tokens are logged
Unit test verifies set/get/delete
Context7 consulted for current Keychain/Security framework usage patterns in Swift; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Central AppContainer dependency wiring
userStories.description: Wire all repositories and services in a single composition root and keep ViewModels injectable.
acceptanceCriteria: AppContainer constructs AuthRepository
AppContainer constructs CredentialStore
ViewModels receive dependencies via initializers
No global singletons except system wrappers
Context7 consulted for DI patterns in SwiftUI apps; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Stabilize xcodebuild destination for automated runs
userStories.description: Pin a simulator destination for repeatable builds/tests and prevent simulator clone explosions in automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Document a single preferred simulator destination string in Docs/DECISIONS.md (or PROJECT_STATUS.md)
Update any automation/test command used by the agent to use the pinned destination
No new simulator clones are created in repeated runs (manual verification note acceptable)
Context7 consulted for current xcodebuild destination usage; summary added to progress.txt
